Return.title: Return
Return.description: A return item to be tracked.

itemName.description: Name of the item being returned.

deadline.description: The deadline date for the return.

packagingRules.description: Rules for packaging the return (e.g., original box required).

imageUrl.description: URL to the saved image or QR code.

mimeType.description: The mime type of the saved image or PDF.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this return.
